title: Accept EDTS-SPEC-3D-001 GLB acquisition & authoring gate for VPR-2
summary: Lock technical criteria for purchasing, commissioning, or authoring the demonstrator vehicle GLB. Config boundary equals CFG-2019-F450-REG-CAB-4X2-60CA-DRW. Require separable GEO_ nodes, front-axle origin CRS, PBR/ORM, and automated verifyMeshMapping against mesh_mapping_manifest.json before Tier-2 admit. Prefer PROXY powertrain node names; treat vendor 6.7L/6R140 names as OPTION_DEPENDENT aliases. Acquisition does not authorize geometry freeze, ASSERTION_VERIFIED mesh, invented mass, or procedure generation.
honesty: No aluminum assertion via cab node name
No 6.7L / 6R140 instance lock without build sheet
